headline.title: ETH favors spot accumulation
headline.summary: Institutional flow is supportive, but the setup is cleaner for spot than for leverage.

component_cards.name: ETF Trend
component_cards.calc_hint: Latest ETF flow and the recent 5-period aggregate are used to frame institutional demand.

component_cards.name: Positioning
component_cards.summary: Positioning is balanced rather than directional.
component_cards.calc_hint: The latest long-short ratio is compared with both 1.0 and its recent average.

component_cards.name: Price Confirmation
component_cards.summary: Price is holding without full confirmation.
component_cards.calc_hint: Recent close, daily return, and short moving averages are compared for confirmation.

component_cards.name: Funding
component_cards.calc_hint: Latest funding is compared with both an extreme threshold and the recent average.

decision_summary.summary: ETF trend is bullish | funding is not overcrowded against longs | signals are mixed across components

calculation_notes.etf: ETF trend uses the latest flow and the recent 5-period aggregate.
calculation_notes.positioning: Positioning compares the latest long-short ratio with 1.0 and its recent sample average.
calculation_notes.price: Price confirmation uses the latest close, daily return, and short moving averages from recent daily candles.
calculation_notes.funding: Funding compares the latest print with an extreme threshold and with the recent funding average.

why: funding is not overcrowded against longs
invalidations: funding becomes too crowded for longs
